rawIntent: Add an audit log dashboard module under src/modules/audit with GET /audit/logs (list with pagination by ?from=&to=&limit=). Use the existing audit-log infrastructure. RBAC must require admin role.

successCriteria.description: A new audit log dashboard module is created under src/modules/audit with a GET /audit/logs endpoint that supports pagination.
The GET /audit/logs endpoint uses the existing audit-log infrastructure.
RBAC is enforced on the GET /audit/logs endpoint, requiring an admin role.

constraints: Every state-changing operation produces an audit record
RBAC enforced at middleware, never inline
Input validated at the API boundary
outOfScope: Changes to roles or role definitions outside of enforcing admin role for this endpoint
